landing.hero_desc: From 1 product photo to thousands of multi-style banners. No design skills needed, optimize CTR with AI. No credit card required.
landing.video_caption: Demo: Create bulk ad banners in 60 seconds with AI
landing.features_title: Everything you need to scale campaigns
landing.features_desc: The fastest mass image production system on the market.
landing.feat_batch_desc: Process thousands of requests simultaneously. Get diverse sizes and layouts in seconds with zero manual intervention.
landing.feat_brand_desc: Automatically embed logos, KOL placements and brand identity perfectly on every frame.
landing.feat_ab_desc: Generate countless variations for ad testing. Save weeks of designer work, automatically find CTR-optimized templates.
landing.feat_4k_desc: Super sharp output files, pixel-perfect detail. Works great for both Digital formats and large-scale OOH print campaigns.
landing.feat_style_desc: Analyze style from reference images and accurately apply that vibe to your product. Maintain visual artistry.
landing.feat_prompt_desc: Built-in optimized prompt system. Just enter your product description, AI will arrange the best layout automatically.
landing.testimonials_desc: Over 500+ businesses and individuals use Banner Studio daily.
landing.t1_content: Since using Banner Studio, I no longer need to wait for designers whenever I need to test new ad creatives. A few lines and I get 50+ banners, CTR increased 45%.
landing.t2_content: Brand guidelines used to give me headaches with AI, but Banner Studio's auto logo recognition and placement system is truly a lifesaver.
landing.t3_content: The batch export feature helps us create hundreds of variations for each product line in under 1 minute. Amazing!
landing.pricing_desc: Choose the plan that fits your image production needs.
landing.cta_title: Ready to digitize your design workflow?
landing.cta_desc: Sign up for a free trial today. No credit card, no commitment.
landing.footer_desc: AI-powered professional banner production automation. Powered by Coach.io.vn
